overall.description: A nighttime exploration of a rainy Western frontier town in Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring wooden architecture, a prominent water tower, and a waterfront dock area. The player character walks through muddy streets illuminated by warm gas lamps while heavy rain creates atmospheric haze and reflections on wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: Western frontier town street with wooden buildings

events.description: large wooden water tower comes into view through the heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy town street toward the illuminated water tower

entered.detail: large building with green roof and illuminated clock face visible through the rain
small wooden structure with sloped roof and dark walls
wooden fence barrier blocking part of the muddy street
tall wooden water tower with support beams and overhead lamp

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a Western town, with the camera moving past a small wooden shed toward a large water tower. The train station building with its green roof and clock serves as a backdrop while heavy rain creates a hazy atmosphere. The muddy ground reflects the warm glow of street lamps as the player explores the empty streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square near water tower transitioning to waterfront

events.description: camera turns right toward the waterfront boardwalk

agents.ego_description: passing close by the water tower and turning toward the waterfront railing

entered.detail: white wooden fence railing along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the imposing wooden water tower, which dominates the left side of the frame. As the player turns toward the waterfront, a wooden railing comes into view on the right. The train station recedes into the background while the open waterfront area becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk overlooking harbor with dock buildings

events.description: view opens up to reveal dock buildings on stilts over the stormy water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront boardwalk observing the illuminated dock buildings across the water

entered.detail: wooden buildings on stilts over the water with warm glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the waterfront boardwalk as the camera moves along the stormy harbor. The wooden railing shifts from right to left as the path curves, revealing dock buildings on stilts across the water. The heavy rain continues to fall, creating ripples on the water surface and reflecting the warm lights from the distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy Western town that transitions from a sheltered street into an open, stormy waterfront. It begins by gliding past a small wooden shed toward a towering water tower, with a green-roofed train station and a clock visible through the heavy, hazy rain. As the camera moves past the imposing structure of the water tower, the perspective shifts toward the harbor, causing the station to recede while a wooden railing emerges on the right. The scene then opens onto the waterfront boardwalk, following the curve of the path as the railing shifts position to reveal dock buildings perched on stilts across the water. Finally, the movement concludes along the harbor's edge, where the falling rain creates constant ripples on the surface and reflects the warm glow of distant lights.
